message:
🌱 pushgateway: If parameters include '/' ,It will response code 400 (#1953)

* 🌱 Add pushgateway: If parameters include '/' ,It will response code 400 mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🌱 Add pushgateway: If parameters include '/' ,It will response code 400 mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: replace raw issue comments with accurate '/' URL encoding docs

Original content was copy-pasted from issue discussion about Go URL parsing.
Replaced with clear explanation of the root cause (Go unescapes %2F before
routing) and the actual fix: Pushgateway v1.0+ supports @base64 prefix for
label values containing special characters. Added working curl examples.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "pushgateway-97-if-parameters-include-it-will-response-code-400",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "pushgateway: Label values containing '/' return HTTP 400",
+    "description": "When pushing metrics to the Pushgateway with label values containing '/', the request returns HTTP 400. This is caused by Go's URL parser unescaping %2F before the router sees the path, making it impossible to distinguish path separators from literal slashes in label values. Resolved in Pushgateway v1.0+ with base64-encoded label value support.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Understand the root cause",
+        "description": "The Pushgateway uses URL path segments to identify job and label values (e.g., `/metrics/job/myjob/instance/myinstance`). When a label value contains `/`, it gets URL-encoded as `%2F`, but Go's `net/http` unescapes it before routing — so the router interprets it as a path separator.\n\nThis is a fundamental limitation of Go's HTTP libraries, not a Pushgateway bug."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade to Pushgateway v1.0+ for base64 support",
+        "description": "Starting with v1.0.0, the Pushgateway supports base64-encoded label values as a workaround. Prefix the value with `@base64` and provide the base64-encoded value:\n```bash\n# Encode the label value containing '/'\necho -n 'path/with/slashes' | base64\n# Output: cGF0aC93aXRoL3NsYXNoZXM=\n\n# Push using base64-encoded value\ncurl -s --data-binary 'some_metric 42' \\\n  'http://localhost:9091/metrics/job/myjob/instance@base64/cGF0aC93aXRoL3NsYXNoZXM='\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the workaround",
+        "description": "Confirm that the metric was pushed correctly with the decoded label value:\n```bash\ncurl -s http://localhost:9091/metrics | grep some_metric\n```\nYou should see the metric with the original label value `path/with/slashes` (decoded from base64)."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Pushgateway v1.0+ supports base64-encoded label values to work around Go's URL parser unescaping %2F. Prefix the label name with @base64 and provide the base64-encoded value in the URL path. This allows label values containing '/' and other special characters.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "echo -n 'value/with/slashes' | base64",
+        "curl -s --data-binary 'some_metric 42' 'http://localhost:9091/metrics/job/myjob/label@base64/<base64-value>'"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "pushgateway",
+      "graduated",
+      "observability",
+      "troubleshoot",
+      "url-encoding"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "pushgateway"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Deployment",
+      "Service"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/prometheus/pushgateway/issues/97",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/prometheus/pushgateway"
+    },
+    "reactions": 0,
+    "comments": 12,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "curl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Prometheus Pushgateway v1.0+ deployment (typically in a monitoring namespace)."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-03T06:34:01.590Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
